name: owa-bridge
description: Makes local Outlook Web mail and calendar tools discoverable from natural-language requests.

interface.shortDescription: Use local Outlook mail and calendar tools
interface.longDescription: Recognizes Outlook, inbox, email, calendar, schedule, and meeting requests and routes them to the guarded local owa-bridge MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Check my Outlook inbox and summarize what needs attention.
Show my Outlook calendar for today.
Find the latest Outlook email about this project.
